title: helianthemum canum subsp. incanum
intro: Helianthemum canum subsp. incanum, also known as Rock Rose, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rock Rose include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
